name: Ham & Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Chopped chives or green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a medium bowl and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat.
3. Using about 1/4 cup batter for each pancake, fry the batter in batches until cooked through and golden brown, adding more oil if necessary, about 3 minutes per side.
4. Transfer the pancakes to a paper-towel-lined baking sheet to drain briefly.
